title: hymenophyllum brevifrons
intro: Hymenophyllum brevifrons, also known as the short-fronded filmy fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant is native to New Zealand and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum brevifrons include its use as an expectorant, helping to relieve coughs and congestion, as well as its antimicrobial properties, which can aid in wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is prepared by infusing the fronds in hot water to make a tea or decoction, which is then used to treat various health conditions.
